description: Schema-correction retry chain: 5 consecutive failures on file_write with wrong arg names, each triggering a full-schema nudge, before a successful call. Tests Phase 3 FEC — errors_learned should surface without recreating failed history.

critical_facts: the correct file_write signature uses 'path' (NOT 'pth', 'file', 'filename', or 'fp')
the eventual successful write was src/config/flags.ts
the content written was `export const FLAG_NEW_UI = true;`
the agent learned both arg-name lessons during the chain

messages.content: 给 src/config/flags.ts 写一行 export const FLAG_NEW_UI = true;

blocks.content: Error: unknown argument 'pth' (did you mean 'path'?) and 'body' (did you mean 'content'?)
Error: unknown argument 'text' (did you mean 'content'?). Full schema: { path: string, content: string, append?: boolean }
Error: unknown argument 'filename' (did you mean 'path'?). Full schema: { path: string, content: string, append?: boolean }
Error: unknown arguments 'fp' / 'data'. REQUIRED keys: path, content

messages.content:
写入成功：src/config/flags.ts = `export const FLAG_NEW_UI = true;`

已经得到的工具规范教训：file_write 的参数是 path（不是 pth/file/filename/fp）和 content（不是 body/text/data）。
